use_cases: Displaying flight search results with airline, times, and route details
Presenting travel packages or flight deals in a visually appealing card format
Mobile flight booking apps requiring compact, tappable flight information cards
Travel agency websites showing curated flight options to customers
Corporate travel dashboards displaying employee flight itineraries
ai_summary: A flight booking card component that displays comprehensive flight information including airline details, departure/arrival cities with codes and times, duration, and an airplane window image. Built with framer-motion for smooth entrance animations and hover scale effects. Uses shadcn/ui styling patterns with rounded corners, shadows, and border utilities. Optimized for travel and e-commerce platforms displaying flight search results or booking interfaces.
